series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes requests for proposals, proposals, evaluation materials, annual reports, correspondence and other documents related to the Changing Campus Culture program.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: paper records may be scanned and destroyed. Otherwise, retain for four years following the end of the award period and then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain four years following the end of the award period and then destroy., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
